extortion.description: [AI generated] "CM Cold Stores" is a UK-based logistics and warehousing company with expertise in frozen and chilled storage. The company provides a range of distribution services for both ambient and temperature-controlled products. It also offers pallet storage, order picking, re-packing, and reverse logistics services. Its facilities are located strategically close to major roads for efficient transport, excelling in delivering high-quality, customer-focused solutions.
